channel.title: Code Reels - Interview Questions
channel.description: Master technical interviews with 196 questions across 36 channels. System design, algorithms, frontend, backend, DevOps, and more.

item.title: algorithms - 9 Questions
item.description: Practice 9 interview questions in algorithms. Difficulty breakdown: 1 beginner, 4 intermediate, 4 advanced.
